summary: Excellent matrix recording of a jam‑heavy second set featuring standout Scarlet Begonias and Playing in the Band
review: The reviewer praises the high‑quality remastered matrix source, calling it great throughout. The second‑set performance is highlighted for tight jams on Scarlet Begonias and Playing in the Band, especially a sweet build into Fire, making this show highly recommended.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review emphasizes both superb recording quality and an exceptional second‑set performance, warranting a high rating but limited confidence due to the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes great recording/remastering with no identified flaws; matrix source captures both clarity and ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows smoothly with extended jams on Scarlet Begonias leading into a powerful transition toward Fire.
